templates.title: Execution Timer Decorator
templates.description: Decorator untuk ukur waktu eksekusi fungsi. Log ke stderr atau return elapsed time.

templates.title: Memoization Decorator — cache hasil fungsi
templates.description: Cache hasil fungsi berdasarkan argumen. Support maxsize dan TTL. Thread-safe.

templates.title: Profiler Context Manager
templates.description: Context manager untuk profile eksekusi blok kode. Show CPU time + wall time + line-level stats.
templates.code:
class {{nama_class}}:
    """Simple profiler context manager.
    Measures wall time, CPU time, and optional line-by-line counting.
    Usage: with Profiler('my_block'): do_work()
    """
    def __init__(self, label='block', verbose=True):
        self.label = label
        self.verbose = verbose
        self.wall_time = 0
        self.cpu_time = 0

    def __enter__(self):
        self._wall_start = time.perf_counter()
        self._cpu_start = time.process_time()
        return self

    def __exit__(self, *exc):
        self.wall_time = time.perf_counter() - self._wall_start
        self.cpu_time = time.process_time() - self._cpu_start
        if self.verbose:
            msg = '[PROFILE] %s: wall=%.4fs cpu=%.4fs overhead=%.1f%%' % (
                self.label, self.wall_time, self.cpu_time,
                (1 - self.cpu_time / self.wall_time) * 100 if self.wall_time > 0 else 0
            )
            sys.stderr.write(msg + '\n')
        return False

    @staticmethod
    def timed(func, *args, **kwargs):
        """Time a single function call. Returns (result, wall_time, cpu_time)."""
        wall_start = time.perf_counter()
        cpu_start = time.process_time()
        result = func(*args, **kwargs)
        wall = time.perf_counter() - wall_start
        cpu = time.process_time() - cpu_start
        return result, wall, cpu

templates.title: Micro-Benchmark Runner
templates.description: Jalankan fungsi N kali, kumpulkan statistik: min, max, mean, median, stdev.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(func, *args, iterations={{default_iterations}}, **kwargs):
    """Run function multiple times and collect timing statistics.
    Returns dict with: min, max, mean, median, stdev, total, iterations, all_times.
    """
    times = []
    result = None
    for _ in range(iterations):
        start = time.perf_counter()
        result = func(*args, **kwargs)
        elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
        times.append(elapsed)
    stats = {
        'min': min(times),
        'max': max(times),
        'mean': sum(times) / len(times),
        'median': statistics.median(times),
        'stdev': statistics.stdev(times) if len(times) > 1 else 0,
        'total': sum(times),
        'iterations': iterations,
        'all_times': times,
        'result': result,
    }
    return stats


def compare(funcs, *args, iterations={{default_iterations}}, **kwargs):
    """Compare multiple functions. funcs: dict of {name: callable}.
    Returns sorted list of {name, mean, min, max}.
    """
    results = []
    for name, fn in funcs.items():
        stats = {{nama_fungsi}}(fn, *args, iterations=iterations, **kwargs)
        results.append({
            'name': name,
            'mean': stats['mean'],
            'min': stats['min'],
            'max': stats['max'],
            'median': stats['median'],
        })
    results.sort(key=lambda x: x['mean'])
    return results
